prompt: This high-energy advertisement features a dynamic composition centered on a powerful female athlete in mid-leap, celebrating with a triumphant fist pump. She is dressed in neon yellow and dark forest green athletic wear that mirrors the branding of the "Submarine" energy drink. A large, tilted energy drink can dominates the midground, erupting with a dramatic splash of golden liquid, while crackling yellow lightning bolts surge around the subject to symbolize explosive energy. The background is a deep gradient sky blue with the word "ENERGY" repeated in bold, oversized lDIM YELLOW typography. The overall aesthetic is cinematic and high-contrast, utilizing a professional studio setup with a reflective dark floor and glowing neon accents. At the bottom, a smaller, upright can sits next to the bold sans-serif tagline "BE UNSTOPPABLE ," grounding the vibrant, action-oriented scene.
